_comment: Manually-added reverse-lookup venues that are NOT from the fully-vegan SVG guide (e.g. vegetarian spots with vegan options). Seeded via scripts/add-restaurant.ts. city is the metro bucket ('seattle'); the venue's town goes in the location neighborhood. verified=false → no 'Fully vegan' badge.

restaurants.name: Chay Concept
restaurants.description: Vegetarian Vietnamese kitchen & bar — plant-forward pho, banh mi, and Vietnamese classics, with vegan options and cocktails.
